seoTitle: Caldwell vs Calga — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Caldwell and Calga. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Caldwell and Calga.
heading: Caldwell vs Calga — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Caldwell, New South Wales and Calga, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Caldwell has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Calga (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Caldwell or Calga safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Caldwell has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Calga scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Caldwell scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Calga scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Caldwell or Calga?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Caldwell has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.08% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
